name: RACCOON (RED)
desc: Vibrant red-toned plush raccoon with detailed striped tail.
descCn: 活泼红色浣熊毛绒玩具，尾巴条纹细节精致。

name: RACCOON (GREY)
desc: Classic grey plush raccoon, soft and huggable.
descCn: 经典灰色浣熊毛绒玩具，柔软亲肤。

name: PANDA
desc: Iconic black and white panda plush, a timeless classic.
descCn: 标志性黑白熊猫毛绒玩具，永恒经典。

name: BLACK BEAR
desc: Bold black plush bear, sturdy and cuddly.
descCn: 黑色大熊毛绒玩具，扎实可爱。

name: WHITE BEAR
desc: Pristine white plush bear, elegant and soft.
descCn: 洁白北极熊毛绒，优雅柔软。

name: BROWN BEAR
desc: Classic brown bear plush, a beloved childhood companion.
descCn: 经典棕熊毛绒，儿时最爱。

name: GREY BEAR
desc: Gentle grey plush bear, perfect for all ages.
descCn: 温柔灰熊毛绒，适合各年龄段。

name: BLOWFISH
desc: Quirky and charming blowfish plush with spiky texture.
descCn: 个性十足的河豚毛绒，带刺纹理独特。

name: UNICORN
desc: Magical pink unicorn plush with shimmering mane.
descCn: 粉色魔法独角兽，鬃毛闪亮迷人。

name: SQUIRREL
desc: Bushy-tailed squirrel plush, full of character.
descCn: 毛茸茸大尾巴松鼠毛绒，充满个性。

name: FOX
desc: Clever and cute fox plush with fluffy tail.
descCn: 聪明可爱的狐狸毛绒，尾巴蓬松。

name: GREY CAT
desc: Soft grey cat plush, serene and cuddly.
descCn: 柔软灰猫毛绒，安静可爱。

name: CALICO CAT
desc: Patterned calico cat plush in warm, natural tones.
descCn: 暖色调花斑猫毛绒，图案精美。

name: RACCOON
desc: Charming raccoon plush with signature masked face.
descCn: 可爱浣熊毛绒，标志性黑眼圈造型。

name: WOLF
desc: Majestic wolf plush with realistic detailing.
descCn: 威风凛凛的狼毛绒，细节逼真。

name: RED RACCOON
desc: Vibrant red-furred raccoon plush, full of personality.
descCn: 鲜红色浣熊毛绒，个性十足。

name: SLOTH
desc: Laid-back sloth plush with long arms, perfect for hugging.
descCn: 慵懒树懒毛绒，长手臂适合拥抱。

name: UNICORN (CLASSIC)
desc: Classic white unicorn plush with golden horn.
descCn: 经典白色独角兽，金色独角亮眼。

name: AXOLOTL
desc: Unique axolotl plush in soft pink, a crowd favourite.
descCn: 粉色蝾螈毛绒，独特可爱，深受喜爱。

name: COW
desc: Classic black and white cow plush, friendly and lovable.
descCn: 经典黑白奶牛毛绒，友好可爱。

name: ELEPHANT
desc: Large and lovable elephant plush with floppy ears.
descCn: 大耳朵大象毛绒，憨厚可爱。
